---
title: 'The Predictability of Stratospheric Warming Events: More from the Troposphere
  or the Stratosphere?'
pagetitle: 2012-2-1-Sun2012 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2012
author: Lantao Sun, Walter A. Robinson and Gang Chen
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 69, 768--783, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0144.1.
recommended_citation: 'Lantao Sun, Walter A. Robinson and Gang Chen, 2012: The Predictability
  of Stratospheric Warming Events: More from the Troposphere or the Stratosphere?,
  <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 69, 768--783, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0144.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-0144.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The Predictability of Stratospheric Warming Events: More from the Troposphere or the Stratosphere?

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2012*

**Recommended citation:** Lantao Sun, Walter A. Robinson and Gang Chen, 2012: The Predictability of Stratospheric Warming Events: More from the Troposphere or the Stratosphere?, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 69, 768--783, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0144.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-0144.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
